_readme: Curated seed dataset of well-known Indian fund managers. Dates marked verified=true were checked against public sources (AMC pages, Value Research, fund factsheet coverage) in July 2026; verified=false entries are best-effort and should be re-checked before being relied on. scheme_name_hint is fuzzy-matched against the schemes table by the loader - Direct Plan Growth variants are preferred.

managers.name: R. Srinivasan
managers.bio: Head of Equities at SBI Mutual Fund; joined SBI MF in 2009. Known for a bottom-up, quality-focused stock-picking style, most visibly in SBI Small Cap.

assignments.scheme_name_hint: SBI Small Cap Fund - Direct Plan - Growth
SBI Focused Fund - Direct Plan - Growth
assignments.note: Has managed the strategy since May 2009 (regular plan); direct plan NAV exists only from Jan 2013, so tenure is clipped to that

managers.name: Sankaran Naren
managers.bio: ED & CIO of ICICI Prudential AMC. Veteran value/contrarian investor. Note: managed Value Discovery up to Feb 2011, then returned to the fund in Jan 2021 - the score below reflects only the current stint.

assignments.scheme_name_hint: ICICI Prudential Value Discovery Fund - Direct Plan - Growth
assignments.note: Current stint began Jan 2021; earlier stint ended Feb 2011

managers.name: Rajeev Thakkar
managers.bio: CIO of PPFAS AMC. Has managed Parag Parikh Flexi Cap since its May 2013 inception; long-horizon, value-oriented, holds foreign equities alongside Indian.

assignments.scheme_name_hint: Parag Parikh Flexi Cap Fund - Direct Plan - Growth

managers.name: Neelesh Surana
managers.bio: CIO of Mirae Asset Investment Managers (India); joined Mirae in 2008. Built the Emerging Bluechip track record from inception.

assignments.scheme_name_hint: Mirae Asset Large & Midcap Fund - Direct Plan - Growth
assignments.note: Managing since fund inception July 2010; direct plan NAV exists only from Jan 2013

managers.name: Vinit Sambre
managers.bio: Head of Equities at DSP; joined in 2007. Long small/mid-cap specialist with a buy-and-hold franchise approach.

assignments.scheme_name_hint: DSP Small Cap Fund - Direct Plan - Growth
assignments.note: Managing since June 2010; direct plan NAV exists only from Jan 2013

managers.name: Chirag Setalvad
managers.bio: Head of Equities at HDFC AMC. Has run HDFC Mid-Cap Opportunities since its June 2007 inception - one of the longest single-fund tenures in Indian equity funds.

assignments.scheme_name_hint: HDFC Mid Cap Fund - Growth Option - Direct Plan
assignments.note: Managing since fund inception 25 June 2007; direct plan NAV exists only from Jan 2013

managers.name: Roshi Jain
managers.bio: Senior fund manager at HDFC AMC, previously at Franklin Templeton. Took over HDFC Flexi Cap after Prashant Jain's July 2022 exit.

assignments.scheme_name_hint: HDFC Flexi Cap Fund - Direct Plan - Growth
assignments.note: Start date approximate to end-July 2022 handover

managers.name: Shreyash Devalkar
managers.bio: Senior equity fund manager at Axis AMC; previously at BNP Paribas AMC. Runs Axis's large-cap franchise.

assignments.scheme_name_hint: Axis Large Cap Fund - Direct Plan - Growth

managers.name: Sailesh Raj Bhan
managers.bio: CIO-Equity at Nippon India MF. Has managed the Multi Cap strategy (formerly Reliance Equity Opportunities) since the mid-2000s.

assignments.scheme_name_hint: Nippon India Multi Cap Fund - Direct Plan - Growth
assignments.note: Managing strategy since ~2005; direct plan NAV exists only from Jan 2013
